cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently highlight robust internal resources for skill development and clear paths for professional advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Work-life balance is highly valued but noted as being entirely dependent on the specific project and client requirements.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: The work environment is often described as inclusive and collaborative, fostering strong teamwork among colleagues.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees appreciate the health and insurance benefits provided, though satisfaction with base pay varies.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: While some appreciate the flexibility of remote work, others express concerns about leadership and organizational safety.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: There is recurring feedback regarding salary stagnation and the feeling of being underpaid relative to market expectations.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report difficulty in achieving salary increases and express frustration with rigid or slow career progression.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Large company structures and bureaucratic processes can lead to feelings of isolation and inconsistent management support.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: High client expectations and project-specific demands can create significant stress and impact personal time.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic management and lack of support in difficult project environments highlight areas for cultural improvement.
